positive_tests.title: Save payment card successfully
positive_tests.description: Verify that a registered shopper can save a valid payment card and it is stored securely.

negative_tests.title: Reject invalid payment card data
negative_tests.description: Verify that invalid payment card data is rejected and appropriate validation errors are returned.
negative_tests.expected_result: Validation error is returned for invalid card data.

validation_tests.title: Validate required request fields
validation_tests.validation_target: Request payload requires amount and currency.
